outputs.description: Detection ID RedCanary.Detection.Headline Human-readable text about the detection
outputs.name: RedCanary.Detection.ID

outputs.description: The severity of the detection (High, medium, or Low) RedCanary.Detection.Summary A summary of information about the detection
outputs.name: RedCanary.Detection.Severity

outputs.description: date The time the detection was confirmed as a threat by Red Canary RedCanary.Detection.Acknowledged
outputs.name: RedCanary.Detection.Time

outputs.description: Whether or not the detection is acknowledged RedCanary.Detection.RemediationStatus The state the detection is currently in
outputs.name: boolean

outputs.description: Fully-qualified endpoint hostname Endpoint.ID Endpoint ID
outputs.name: Endpoint.Hostname

outputs.description: IP address of the endpoint Endpoint.MACAddress MAC address of the endpoint
outputs.name: Endpoint.IPAddress

outputs.description: The operating system used by the endpoint Endpoint.OSVersion The complete operating system version identifier used by the endpoint
outputs.name: Endpoint.OS

outputs.description: Physical memory of the endpoint in bytes Endpoint.IsIsolated Whether or not the endpoint is currently network isolated
outputs.name: Endpoint.Memory

outputs.description: Whether or not the endpoint is decommissioned Account.Username Endpoint user name
outputs.name: Endpoint.IsDecommissioned
